MINI MINUTES: Dept. 218, Commissioner: William Gargano; Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha; Not Reported.
Appearances:
Jeffrey Chen, Esq. for and with the Plaintiff Eliza Fain.
David Beach, Esq., through limited scope, for and with the Defendant: Scott Turner.
This matter comes on calendar for an Unlawful Detainer Settlement Conference.
The Judge Pro Tem: Don Sullivan, litigants and counsel confer privately for settlement discussions in room 304-B.
The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed.
Case settled, TRIAL DATE vacated.
